commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix recording race condition and improve recorded file handling

- Add "stopping" state to poll sampler finalization before loading WAV,
  preventing "No waveform data" error from async stop
- Show "SAVING..." screen while waiting for WAV to finalize
- Track recorded files as unsaved (dirty) with discard-on-exit cleanup
- Add timestamp to edit filenames (sample_edit_0306_1423.wav)
- Clean up recording UI header (remove debug VU display)
- Add dirty param support to DSP plugin

Remap knobs: E4=vertical scale, E5=gain/threshold, E7/E8=twist actions

- E3: zoom only (removed shift+E3 vertical scale)

repository.name: snake-game
repository.description: Snake game in Python with Flask + WebSocket — server-side game logic, HTML5 Canvas rendering

commit.message:
Fix false positives in exploit/scan modules (FW3.7.1)

- Add _discover_params(): crawl real page params before testing
- SQLi: use baseline comparison to filter pre-existing SQL-like text
- SQLi: time-based threshold now requires +4s vs baseline (not raw 2.5s)
- XSS: use unique session marker instead of generic payloads
- XSS: remove DOM sink false positives (innerHTML/eval exist everywhere)
- CMDi: use echo CMDI_CONFIRMED marker, remove generic 'ttl' indicator
- LFI: remove empty indicator payload (matched everything)
- LFI: use specific indicators (root:x:0:0:, HTTP_HOST=)
- vBulletin: require 'vbulletin' in response body (not just 302)
- upload_check: only report 200 with upload form content (not 403)
- sqli_scan: discover real params from page before injecting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Release WebGate FW3.7

New features:
- SSH backdoor via RCE CVE with Scope Agreement (typed 'I accept')
- TOR routing via bridge (obfs4/webtunnel/snowflake)
- SQLMap interactive dump dialog: pick DB -> table -> dump in GUI
- CVEExploitOfferDialog: auto-prompt when RCE CVE detected after scan
- ScopeAgreementDialog: typed 'I accept' confirmation before exploit
- SSHBackdoorDialog: configure SSH credentials + TOR bridge
- SQLMapDumpDialog: GUI-based DB/table selector with background dump

Improvements:
- Simplified reports: SQL injection Y/N + vulnerable param/payload
- XSStrike output simplified to injection Y/N + vulnerable URL
- Progress bar with gradient, % overlay, bright pulse edge animation
- Logo glitch animation (random interval glitch effect)
- Particle burst animation on scan start
- FW badge in logo canvas
- Scan-line border animation during active scan

Fixes:
- Removed COPY button (caused GUI freeze/lag on Wayland)
- Version strings updated to FW3.7
- LICENSE added (authorized use only)
- README.md fully rewritten with all features documented

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: rewrite pagination to eliminate excessive gaps in NDA/Contract PDFs

Root cause: _paginateBlocks was too aggressive:
- inSafe zone (70px) pushed blocks that fully fit on the page
- PAD=70 added unnecessary gap after page push
- 3 iterative passes caused cascading spacer accumulation
- FOOTER_ZONE=95px was 25% larger than actual footer (20mm)

Changes:
- Remove inSafe check — only push blocks that actually cross contentEnd
- Push blocks directly past header zone of next page (no extra PAD)
- FOOTER_ZONE: 95→76px (exact 20mm match to overlay white rect)
- 2 passes instead of 3 (footer→header→footer)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add comprehensive tests and CI workflow for all commits

commit.message:
fix: remove min-h-screen and scroll hint to eliminate hero/features gap

The min-h-screen forced the hero to fill the viewport, creating a large
empty gap between the stat pills and the features section. Replaced with
fixed padding (pt-32 pb-20) so content dictates height. Removed scroll
hint indicator which contributed to the dead space.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix P0 production readiness: health check, graceful shutdown, input validation

- /ready now checks Postgres (SELECT 1) and Redis (PING), returning 503
  with degraded status when either is unreachable
- Graceful shutdown drains HTTP server, then BullMQ workers, then closes
  infrastructure — prevents dropped in-flight requests and jobs
- All route :id params validated as UUID format before casting
- All limit/offset query params parsed via Zod (NaN-safe, bounded 1-100)
- Identity PATCH routes whitelist allowed column names to prevent SQL
  column injection via user-supplied field keys
- Add .dockerignore to exclude .git, node_modules, test/, and dev artifacts

feat: v1.8.0 - Auto-update + Reimprimir + Proteção Duplicada

PROBLEMA RESOLVIDO:
1. ❌ Aba "Impressora" confusa (parece configurar impressora lá)
2. ❌ Risco de impressão duplicada (mesmo pedido 2x)
3. ❌ Sem forma de reimprimir quando acaba tinta
4. ❌ Link de download genérico (sem versão específica)
5. ❌ Sem notificação de atualizações

SOLUÇÃO v1.8.0:

1️⃣ PAINEL WEB MELHORADO:
✅ Alerta destacado explicando que NÃO configura impressora
✅ Fluxo claro: Gerar Token → Baixar App → Configurar no App
✅ Links diretos de download (Windows/macOS v1.8.0)
✅ Cards visuais com ícones e tamanho de arquivo
✅ Link "Ver todas as versões" para GitHub releases

2️⃣ BOTÃO REIMPRIMIR:
✅ Action "Reimprimir" em OrderResource (Filament)
✅ Ícone: heroicon-o-printer
✅ Visível apenas para pedidos PAGOS
✅ Confirmação antes de reimprimir
✅ Dispara NewOrderEvent manualmente
✅ Notificação de sucesso/erro
✅ Útil quando acaba tinta ou papel

3️⃣ AUTO-UPDATE (electron-updater):
✅ Verifica atualizações ao iniciar (após 3s)
✅ Menu Tray: "🔄 Verificar Atualizações"
✅ Dialog pergunta se quer baixar
✅ Progress bar durante download
✅ Dialog pergunta se quer instalar agora
✅ Logs detalhados de cada etapa
✅ Desabilitado em modo dev
✅ Configurado para GitHub releases

4️⃣ PROTEÇÃO DUPLICADA:
✅ Map<orderId, timestamp> rastreia impressões
✅ Cooldown de 5 minutos por pedido
✅ Se receber mesmo pedido antes de 5min → Ignora
✅ Log de aviso quando bloqueado
✅ Evento 'print-skipped' para UI
✅ Limpeza automática de registros antigos (>10min)
✅ Permite reimprimir após cooldown expirar

ARQUIVOS MODIFICADOS:

resources/views/filament/restaurant/pages/printer-settings.blade.php:
- Alerta destacado no topo
- Texto claro: "Esta página NÃO configura impressoras"
- Fluxo passo a passo
- Cards de download (Win/Mac) com links diretos
- Versão específica: 1.8.0

app/Filament/Restaurant/Resources/OrderResource.php:
- Action "reprint" após EditAction
- visible: apenas se payment_status = 'paid'
- requiresConfirmation modal
- Dispara NewOrderEvent
- Notification sucesso/erro

electron-bridge/package.json:
- Versão: 1.7.0 → 1.8.0
- Nova dependência: electron-updater ^6.1.7
- build.publish: GitHub (orfeubr/yumgo)

electron-bridge/src/main.js:
- Import: autoUpdater, dialog
- Configuração: autoDownload = false
- Event handlers:
  • update-available → Dialog baixar?
  • download-progress → Progress UI
  • update-downloaded → Dialog instalar?
  • update-not-available → Log
  • error → Log
- Função checkForUpdates()
- Menu Tray: Item "Verificar Atualizações"
- app.whenReady(): Verificação automática após 3s
- Map printedOrders: rastrear impressões
- PRINT_COOLDOWN: 5 minutos
- Proteção no channel.listen():
  • Verifica se já impresso recentemente
  • Se sim: Log warn + evento 'print-skipped'
  • Se não: Registra + imprime
  • Limpeza de registros antigos

FLUXO DE AUTO-UPDATE:
1. App inicia → Aguarda 3s
2. autoUpdater.checkForUpdates()
3. GitHub releases API verifica versão
4. Se nova versão:
   → Dialog: "v1.9.0 disponível! Baixar?"
   → Usuário: "Sim" → Baixa
   → Progress: "Baixando... 47%"
   → Completo: "Instalar e Reiniciar?"
   → Usuário: "Sim" → Reinicia + instala
5. Se não: Log "App atualizado"

FLUXO DE PROTEÇÃO:
1. WebSocket: NewOrderEvent (order #123)
2. Verificar: printedOrders.has(123)?
3. Se SIM e < 5min:
   → Log: "Já impresso há 2m30s. Ignorando."
   → return; // Não imprime
4. Se NÃO ou > 5min:
   → printedOrders.set(123, now)
   → Imprime normalmente
5. Limpeza: Remove registros > 10min

BENEFÍCIOS:
✅ Menos confusão para restaurantes
✅ Economia de papel (sem duplicação)
✅ Reimprimir quando necessário
✅ Atualizações automáticas (sempre com última versão)
✅ Controle do usuário (pergunta antes de baixar/instalar)

PRÓXIMOS PASSOS:
- npm install (adicionar electron-updater)
- npm run build:win
- Criar GitHub release v1.8.0
- Restaurantes receberão notificação de atualização

commit.message:
docs: BOSS Multi-Agent Workflow Design (Issue #22)

Complete design document for BOSS multi-agent coordination workflow.

This design proposes an ACP workflow to standardize agent participation in 
BOSS coordination spaces, replacing ad-hoc curl commands with structured 
commands, skills, and templates.

Key components:
- Commands: /boss.check-in, /boss.read, /boss.post, /boss.ignite
- Skills: Protocol reference, status formatter
- Templates: Status updates, interrupt requests
- Migration strategy with phased rollout

All agents reviewed and approved this design. Per Issue #22, implementation 
awaits explicit human approval.

Closes #22

Add title-stop pause before navigating to next sibling group

When > would jump sideways/up to a new branch, it first pauses on
the parent node (title stop) so the reader sees the section heading.
The next > delivers the queued destination. < cancels the title stop
and returns to where the user was. Top/Up and child-button taps also
clear any pending title stop.

iter39: FAST_300_MODE 7 events <=300s + timing gap + all-miss estimate

A) verify_online.ps1: FAST_300_MODE (hard cap 300s, soft 270s, auto-enables FAST_600_MODE)
   - FAST_300_HARD_EXCEEDED gate: total>300 → FAIL-fast
B) run_once.py: selection target raised to 7 events (was 5)
   - density swap pool expanded to include 800-char items (3 rounds)
   - pool_sufficiency thresholds: >=6/>=4 (was >=5/>=3)
C) DIGEST_DENSITY_FLOOR_HARD unchanged (bullet>=5 OR chars>=1200)
D) Timing gap instrumentation:
   - z0_collect_online stage (verify_online.ps1 Z0 web scraping)
   - digest_write stage, other_seconds = total - sum(stages)
   - TIMING_GAP_LARGE warning when other_seconds > 30
E) All-miss translate risk estimation in translation_engine.meta.json:
   - translate_seconds, workload_chars_total, workload_bullets_total
   - est_translate_seconds_if_all_miss, est_total_seconds_if_all_miss
F) Meta consistency: BRIEF_MAX_EVENTS=8 for 7 events

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
